title: Trump calls off AI executive order over concern it could weaken U.S. tech edge
description: President Donald Trump has called off plans to sign a new executive order on artificial intelligence hours before an expected White House ceremony
content:
President Trump called off plans to sign a new executive order on artificial intelligence hours before an expected White House ceremony on Thursday because he said he was worried the measure could dull America’s edge on AI technology.
